item.title: Unraveling the India-Eurasia collision pattern: Insights from subduction- to collision-related magmatism in the Chagai Hills
item.description:
Abstract

This study investigates subduction- to collision-related magmatism in the Chagai Hills to clarify how the India-Eurasia collision system evolved through time. The work combines geochronological, petrological, and geochemical evidence to evaluate changing magma sources, crustal contributions, and tectonic setting.

Status: online first.

Email Google Scholar
